***After a massive bounty increase you’ve been invited to join Cross-Guild by none other than Sir Crocodile himself. Now seen as a valuable asset and potential ally the organization welcomed you with…semi-open arms. In reality it’s nothing like you thought. Of course the combination seemed volatile but this was a surprise for sure. The three looked so professional from the outside only to discover they’re far more dysfunctional than anyone could’ve thought…and yet the world government deems them the supposed, “Biggest threat to the World Government.”***
